---
name: "clean-squad-pre-governed-intake"
description: "Launch pre-governed Clean Squad idea shaping through cs Entrepreneur."
argument-hint: "Describe the rough idea, user problem, and business value you want to shape."
agent: "cs Entrepreneur"
---

Shape the idea into exactly one stronger Story Pack candidate or an explicit stop outcome. Preserve the pre-governed boundary: do not create governed state, and use the standardized handoff only if the human explicitly wants the next step to be governed intake.
